original_prompt:
A 4x4 icon contact sheet on a PURE SOLID #1a1b26 dark navy background (no pattern, no gradient, no checkerboard). Exactly 16 flat vector icons for 'Wodouyao', a dark-mode desktop terminal multiplexer, arranged in a 4x4 grid. Each icon fills a 128px cell centered, with equal padding. CRITICAL STYLE RULES: NO glow, NO drop shadow, NO halo, NO outer highlight, NO soft edges, NO outer bloom, NO radial fade around icons. Only sharp flat shapes with crisp edges. Solid fill colors, no gradients except where explicitly stated.
Colors available: blue #7aa2f7, green #9ece6a, orange #ff9e64, pink #f7768e, purple #bb9af7, cyan #7dcfff, off-white #c0caf5, yellow #e0af68, gray #565f89.
Icons (left-to-right, top-to-bottom, NO TEXT LABELS anywhere):
Row 1: (1) rounded-square blue tile with a simple 'W' monogram in white inside it, (2) simple arrow cursor pointer in white, (3) dashed rectangle outline in white, (4) two small dots connected by a single curved line in white.
Row 2: (5) 8-pointed asterisk star in solid orange, (6) solid green diamond (rhombus), (7) outlined cyan diamond with 2px stroke, transparent inside, (8) solid white filled rectangle (terminal block cursor).
Row 3: (9) solid green dot with a concentric green ring around it, (10) gray circle with a white X inside, (11) yellow lightning bolt zigzag, (12) two vertical purple bars.
Row 4: (13) three small white dots with short diagonal motion lines trailing behind them, (14) two overlapping purple sine waves, (15) three simplified white figure silhouettes grouped together, (16) gear cog outline in white with 6 teeth.
Consistent 3px stroke weight where strokes are used. Flat vector illustration, like a pixel-perfect Lucide or Heroicons set, but on a dark background. No glow, no shadow, no blur, no halo.
